title: 100 Hours Testing Claude Code vs ChatGPT Codex (honest results)
summary: Nate Herk conducted a 100-hour empirical comparison of Claude Code and ChatGPT Codex using identical prompts and build tasks side by side. The video presents comparative findings on performance, pricing, and suitability for coding automation, with stated surprises about one tool's capabilities.
